build.beforeBuildCommand: vp exec react-router build --mode desktop && node scripts/verify-desktop-build.mjs

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:11434 http://localhost:11434 https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A workplace comedy management sim where you coach dates between hopefuls from across realities.
bundle.longDescription: IDC (Interdimensional Dating Coach) is a private alpha desktop build of a local-first management sim. You work at Cupid, the agency that books dates between hopefuls drawn from across realities. Bring your own Ollama or Vercel AI Gateway key.
